{{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Relic Infobox|Snecko Skull|2|Name=Snecko Skull}}{{Power Infobox|Poison|2}}
{{R|Snecko Skull|Snecko Skull|2}} is a {{QueryLink|Relics|character:Silent|Silent-exclusive|2}} {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. It applies an additional 1 {{KW|Poison||2}} whenever another source applies {{KW|Poison||2}}.

== Spawn Restrictions==

Can only be obtained by {{2|Silent}}.

==Unlocking Snecko Skull==
{{R|Snecko Skull||2}} is unlocked along with {{R|Twisted Funnel||2}} and {{R|Helical Dart||2}} in the {{2|Timeline#Nemesis|Nemesis}} Epoch.

=== Synergies ===
{{R|Snecko Skull||2}} works best with cards that apply poison in multiple instances, such as {{C|Bouncing Flask||2}} or {{C|Envenom||2}}.
